# Power-strap geometry extracted verbatim from TinyTapeout's official analog init
# script, magic_init_project.tcl. Units are DBU (1 dbu = 1 nm). Source (fetched
# 2026-07-06):
#   https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TinyTapeout/tt-support-tools/main/tech/sky130A/def/analog/magic_init_project.tcl
#
# Each strap is: box $x 5um $x 220.76um ; box width 2um ; paint met4.
# So the strap spans y 5000..220760 and is 2000 nm wide (half-width 1000), on met4.
# The minimum allowed width is 1.2um (1200 dbu), noted in the script.
strap_layer met4
strap_bottom_y 5000
strap_top_y 220760
strap_width 2000
strap_min_width 1200
#
# Per-net x centers, from the script's POWER_STRIPES list:
#   VDPWR 1um, VGND 4um, and (3v3 template) VAPWR 7um.
vdpwr_x 1000
vgnd_x 4000
vapwr_x 7000
